name: MfaVerifyRequest
description: MfaVerifyRequest schema from Bandwidth mfa API

to.description: The phone number the MFA code was sent to, in E.164 format

scope.description: The scope that was used when the code was generated. Must match for verification to succeed.

code.description: The MFA code entered by the user for verification

expirationTimeInMinutes.description: The expiration window to check against, in minutes
